checks.expected_outcome: All six functional test roles are NOLOGIN, non-superuser, non-BYPASSRLS, non-owner roles with no unexpected memberships.
The reader role can read an authorized same-scope row through the accepted typed-read surface.
The reader role cannot observe a different-scope row and receives the accepted uniform blocked or empty result.
The backup role can read authorized same-scope rows through the accepted typed-read surface with the active scope recorded.
The backup role cannot observe rows outside the active scope through the accepted typed-read surface.
The reader role cannot INSERT, UPDATE, or DELETE base evidence rows.
The ingest role can perform only the accepted same-scope write and a cross-scope write is rejected by WITH CHECK.
Application roles do not own protected tables and FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY remains enabled.
